esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-haproxyreceiver.otel-*
// Queue time (wait for server assignment) — any non-zero signals saturation
| WHERE haproxy.requests.average_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_qtime = MAX(haproxy.requests.average_time)
  BY haproxy.proxy_name, haproxy.service_name, haproxy.addr
// Threshold in ms — even small values indicate capacity pressure
| WHERE max_qtime > 10
| EVAL alert_key = CONCAT(TO_STRING(haproxy.proxy_name), "::", TO_STRING(haproxy.service_name), "::", COALESCE(TO_STRING(haproxy.addr), ""))
| SORT max_qtime DESC
| LIMIT 50
